title: CapabilityLease
description: A time-bounded lease granting specific capabilities to a node for executing a plan, with explicit scope constraints and revocation tracking.

lease_id.description: Unique identifier for this capability lease.

issued_by.description: The identifier of the entity that issued this lease.

node_id.description: The identifier of the node to which capabilities are granted.

execution_plan_id.description: The identifier of the execution plan this lease authorizes.

granted_capabilities.description: A map of capabilities that are explicitly granted by this lease.

denied_capabilities.description: A map of capabilities that are explicitly denied by this lease.

max_files_modified.description: The maximum number of files that may be modified under this lease.

allowed_paths.description: Paths within which modifications are permitted.

scope_constraints.description: Constraints that limit the scope of operations under this lease.

valid_from.description: ISO 8601 timestamp from which this lease is valid.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which this lease expires.

revocation_status.description: The current revocation status of this lease.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the signer that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this capability lease.
